hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then case "$(basename "$FILE_PATH")" in .env|.env.*|*.key|*.pem) echo "BLOCKED: $FILE_PATH is a protected file" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CMD" ]; then case "$CMD" in *'rm -rf /'*|*'rm -rf /*'*) echo "BLOCKED: Destructive rm -rf on root is not allowed" >&2; exit 2 ;; *'git push'*'--force'*|*'git push'*'-f '*) echo "BLOCKED: Force push detected. Use regular push or get explicit approval." >&2; exit 2 ;; *'git reset --hard'*) echo "WARNING: git reset --hard detected. Uncommitted changes will be lost." >&2; exit 2 ;; *'git clean -f'*) echo "WARNING: git clean -f will delete untracked files permanently." >&2; exit 2 ;; *'kubectl delete'*'--all'*) echo "BLOCKED: kubectl delete --all is too dangerous. Specify resources explicitly." >&2; exit 2 ;; *'kubectl apply'*'--force'*) echo "BLOCKED: kubectl apply --force is not recommended. Use regular apply." >&2; exit 2 ;; *'helm delete'*|*'helm uninstall'*) echo "WARNING: Helm release deletion detected. Confirm this is intentional." >&2; exit 2 ;; *'docker system prune'*) echo "WARNING: docker system prune will remove all unused data." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi; exit 0
